title: Decision
description: The disposition of an ECB summons after its OATH hearing — the Hearing Officer's finding, the penalty imposed, and any docketed judgment. Canonical schema reconciling the decision/penalty columns of 'OATH Hearings Division Case Status' (jz4z-kudi): Hearing Result, Decision Date, Decision Location (Borough), Penalty Imposed, Additional Penalties or Late Fees, Date Judgment Docketed, Balance Due, Paid Amount. Keyed back to the summons by Ticket Number.

ticketNumber.description: 'Ticket Number' — the summons this decision resolves.

dateJudgmentDocketed.description: 'Date Judgment Docketed' — when an unpaid default became an enforceable judgment (collected by DOF).
